title: MODERATE: Combobox trigger has no accessible label
description: M6: src/components/ui/combobox.tsx:41-55 — the trigger `<button>` has `role="combobox"` and `aria-expanded` but no `aria-label` or `aria-labelledby`. Screen readers have no context for what this combobox selects.
resolution: Added aria-label={selectedLabel ?? placeholder} to combobox trigger button
